page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.i2g family. It is equipped with 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system features 128.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core, and includes a bundled 3839 GB local SSD storage volume. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance, measured via stress-ng and Geekbench, falls into the bottom 25%, and single-threaded compression tasks show weak results. However, multi-core CPU performance and multi-threaded decompression scale to average levels. Memory bandwidth tests for both small and large blocks also register in the average tier, though the overall Passmark memory score remains in the lower 25%.

The inclusion of a large 3839 GB local SSD makes this instance highly resource-dense for storage-heavy workloads. It achieves average performance in database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving. Given the balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and substantial local SSD capacity, this server is configured for database hosting, local caching, and general-purpose workloads requiring high-capacity local storage without the need for high single-threaded compute performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.8xlarge is an x86_64 server instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor at 2.5 GHz, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM and a bundled 3839 GB local SSD. While single-core CPU and memory benchmark scores fall into the lower 25% tier, its multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations consistently reach average levels. The instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. With its high-capacity local SSD storage and balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this server is designed for storage-intensive workloads, database hosting, and multi-threaded applications that benefit from local data caching rather than peak single-threaded processing speed.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.8xlarge is a storage-focused server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 3839 GB local SSD, delivering average multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2g.8xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 3839 GB local SSD for storage-heavy workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core server featuring high-capacity bundled local SSD storage for data-intensive and database workloads.

128.0 GB of RAM providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
